name: checkpoint_quantum_firewall
explanation: Check Point Quantum Firewall is a logs-only vendor security tile. The spec defines only a `logs` template (tcp/udp syslog with `<PORT>` placeholder) and there is no Agent check class under `datadog_checks/checkpoint_quantum_firewall/` (only `__init__.py` exposing `__version__`). Setup is purely configuring `cp_log_export` on the Check Point management server to forward JSON-format syslog to a port the Agent listens on. There is no metrics endpoint to probe, no host/port the Agent can autodiscover from the wire, and the listener port is operator policy.
notes: Pattern N (logs-only). No check.py exists; integration is a logs config + manifest only. Identical shape to cisco_secure_firewall.
